# `!wait_for_host`

**Category:** control

Poll the target over SSH until it responds, useful after provisioning VMs/LXCs. Fails on timeout.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `timeout` | int | no | Maximum seconds to wait for connectivity. Default 300. |
| `delay` | int | no | Seconds between retry attempts. Default 5. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !wait_for_host
  name: Wait for new VM to accept SSH
  timeout: 600
  delay: 10
```
